vocab.meaning: mở rộng tầm nhìn (nghĩa bóng: làm không gian có vẻ rộng hơn)
vocab.example: Strategically placing a large mirror can really broaden the horizons of a cramped bedroom, making it feel far less claustrophobic.

vocab.meaning: cao hơn một bậc/đẳng cấp hơn
vocab.example: Choosing a mirror with an ornate, hand-carved frame definitely puts the room's decor a notch above the standard minimalist style.

vocab.meaning: xác nhận/đảm bảo cho cái gì (về tính hiệu quả)
vocab.example: Any interior designer would vouch for the effectiveness of mirrors when you want to maximize the natural light in a north-facing room.

vocab.meaning: tự thân nó đã là (một thứ gì đó ấn tượng)
vocab.example: A sunburst mirror is so visually striking that it acts as a piece of fine art in its own right, even without other decorations.

vocab.meaning: làm điều gì đó đến cùng/làm một cách triệt để
vocab.example: If I had a larger budget, I’d go the whole hog and install a full-length mirrored wall to create a truly palatial feel.

vocab.meaning: với ngân sách rất hạn hẹp
vocab.example: Decorating on a shoestring is much easier when you use second-hand mirrors to add character without spending too much.

vocab.meaning: vẹn cả đôi đường/tốt cả hai mặt
vocab.example: Mirrors offer the best of both worlds because they are highly practical for grooming while also being aesthetically pleasing.

vocab.meaning: bằng cách tương tự/cũng vì lẽ đó
vocab.example: Mirrors brighten up a space; by the same token, they can also make a room feel more balanced and harmonious.

vocab.meaning: tạo ấn tượng rạng rỡ/vẻ ngoài bảnh bao
vocab.example: An antique mirror with a silver finish really helps the room cut a dash, giving it a sophisticated and polished look.

vocab.meaning: thỏa thích/theo ý muốn của ai đó
vocab.example: In my own home, I can experiment with different mirror shapes and sizes to my heart's content until I find the perfect layout.
